title: High stakes battle in Darbhanga Rural as rival candidates file affidavits
snippet_text: The election filing process completed today in Darbhanga Rural. Multi-millionaire candidates and independent leaders enter the fray, making the contest highly unpredictable.

title: Voter turnout expected to touch record highs in Darbhanga Rural
snippet_text: Electoral awareness campaigns and intense political mobilization by party workers point to a high turnout of youth and women voters in Darbhanga Rural constituency.

title: Bihar Elections 2025: Key issues dominate debates in Darbhanga Rural
snippet_text: As the election campaign intensifies, voters in Darbhanga Rural assembly constituency raise questions about infrastructure development, road connectivity, and agricultural support schemes.
